articles.title: Shakun Batra On Fawad Khan’s Coming-Out Scene In Kapoor & Sons: ‘It Had To Feel Honest’
articles.description: Shakun Batra explains the intention behind Fawad Khan’s coming-out scene in Kapoor & Sons and why Rahul was written as a complete person rather than a stereotype.

articles.title: 25-Year-Old Gurugram Woman Breaks Down Her Rs 2.4 Lakh Monthly Budget, Internet Stunned | WATCH Viral Video
articles.description: A 25-year-old Gurugram resident, Mishika Sharma, went viral after sharing a detailed breakdown of her monthly expenses on Instagram, totaling around Rs 2.4 lakhs. Her video detailed costs like Rs 85,000 for rent and significant amounts for fitness and investments, sparking varied reactions online about her luxury lifestyle.

articles.title: Bhagyashri Borse drops curious hint on her relationship with her 'Andhra King Taluka' co-star Ram Pothineni
articles.description: Actress Bhagyashri Borse has sparked fresh speculation about her relationship with 'Andhra King Taluka' co-star Ram Pothineni. During a recent interview, Borse referred to Hyderabad as her 'second home,' a comment fans are interpreting as a hint towards a deeper connection with the Telugu film industry and potentially Pothineni. While neither actor has confirmed the rumors, Borse's statement has fueled ongoing fan discussions.

articles.title: 500 plants, 100 birds, 25 butterfly species: At 23, Delhi boy turns home terrace into lush urban forest. How a childhood love for birdwatching sparked a mission to protect urban wildlife
articles.description: Aman Sharma, a 23-year-old Delhi resident, has transformed his 15,000 sq ft terrace into a thriving urban forest, a testament to his passion for wildlife and conservation. This green haven now hosts over 100 bird species and 25 butterfly varieties, showcasing the impact of one young individual's dedication to environmental change. His initiative highlights how simple actions can foster biodiversity in metropolitan areas.

articles.title: Shilpa Shinde Doesn’t Like Women Who Drink Or Smoke, Prefers Seeing Them In Saree: She Should Know Her Values
articles.description: Shilpa Shinde has made yet another controversial statement in a recent interview. The Bhabiji Ghar Par Hain actress said that she doesn't like women who smoke or drink. Read full story to know more.

articles.title: Selena Gomez-Timothee Chalamet To Star In Not Alone - All About The Animated Film
articles.description: Timothee Chalamet and Selena Gomez will lead Illumination’s animated film Not Alone, voicing Joe and Fran, whose lives change after three runaway aliens seek help. The film is directed by Illumination veterans and releases on April 16, 2027.

articles.title: Rahul Banerjee’s last film to hit screens in July
articles.description: Discover the legacy of Rahul Banerjee as his last film 'Katukutu Buro', a captivating social thriller, hits theaters this July. Directed by Ujaan Ganguly, the film explores themes of hope and madness in a morally challenged city.

articles.title: Shatrughan Sinha says he benefitted from working with Amitabh Bachchan and Jeetendra: 'Mere sense of humour mein jyada nikhaar aagaya'
articles.description: Veteran actor Shatrughan Sinha reminisced about his film career on Indian Idol, highlighting his strong bond with Amitabh Bachchan and Jeetendra. Sinha praised their camaraderie and support, noting how working with them enhanced his comedic timing. Despite past industry rumors of rivalry with Bachchan, Sinha emphasized their mutual respect and successful collaborations over the years, including films like 'Dostana' and 'Shaan'.

articles.title: Imtiaz Ali Visits Theatres Across Cities To Thank Audiences As Main Vaapas Aaunga Grows Strong
articles.description: Imtiaz Ali film Main Vaapas Aaunga sees strong box office growth via word of mouth, director tours theatres to thank fans. Film's plot revisits Partition era love story.

articles.title: Akshay Kumar-Raveena Tandon discussed their kids on Welcome to the Jungle set, says Ahmed Khan: ‘Everybody moves on’
articles.description: Bollywood stars Akshay Kumar and Raveena Tandon will reunite onscreen in Welcome To The Jungle after a gap of 22 years.

articles.title: Sara Ali Khan Attends Pakistani Actress Kubra Khan’s Birthday In London; Sharmila Tagore Feeds Her Cake
articles.description: Sara Ali Khan and Sharmila Tagore attended Kubra Khan’s London birthday bash. A viral video shows Sharmila feeding cake to the Pakistani actress.

articles.title: 'Maa Inti Bangaram' box office collection Day 4 [LIVE]: Samantha Ruth Prabhu starrer eyes Rs 28–30 crore net by week's end after strong opening weekend run
articles.description: Samantha Ruth Prabhu's 'Maa Inti Bangaram' delivered a rare feat over its opening weekend, three consecutive days of growth rather than the usual weekend plateau. After a Rs. 5.35 crore Day 1, the film jumped 43% on Day 2 to Rs. 7.65 crore and a further 32% on Day 3 to Rs. 10.10 crore, taking its three-day domestic net to Rs. 23.10 crore and worldwide gross to Rs 41.79 crore. As the film enters its first Monday, live tracking shows Rs. 0.82 crore collected so far across 1,236 shows, split Rs 0.77 crore in Telugu and Rs. 0.05 crore in Tamil, pushing the cumulative domestic net to Rs. 23.92 crore. With momentum building with each day, B.V. Nandini Reddy's female-led action-family drama looks well positioned for a strong first week.

articles.title: Sorry, Shaktimaan! Mukesh Khanna teams up with Samay Raina months after 'Latent' row but the internet isn't amused
articles.description: After indulging in an intense war of words earlier this year, Mukesh Khanna has done an unexpected collaboration with Samay Raina. The two appeared together in a new advertisement. However, their collaboration took many by surprise as some hailed it, while others criticised Mukesh for working with Samay after calling him a "dog's tail" and remarking that "he should be paraded on a donkey" in April this year.

articles.description: Anshula Kapoor and Rohan Thakkar are all set to tie the knot and their pre-wedding celebration was attended by Janhvi Kapoor, Arjun Kapoor and the entire Kapoor clan.

articles.title: From Brahma Kamal to Night phlox: 7 rare flowers you will only see blooming under the moonlight
articles.description: Discover nature's nocturnal wonders as several captivating flowers unfurl their petals only after sunset. From the famed Queen of the Night cactus to the glowing Moonflower and fragrant Evening Primrose, these blooms release enchanting scents to attract night pollinators. Explore the mysterious beauty of these rare, short-lived blossoms that transform gardens and forests into magical nocturnal landscapes.

articles.title: Why Agent Vinod remains Sriram Raghavan’s most fascinating failure
articles.description: On Sriram Raghavan's 63rd birthday, looking back at Agent Vinod, a box-office misfire with irresistible charm.

articles.title: Did Amruta Fadnavis ask Sreeleela to move out of the frame? Netizens react
articles.description: A video of actress Sreeleela and Amruta Devendra Fadnavis from a Yoga Day event has gone viral across social media platforms. The moment unfolded when Amruta attended the event with her daughter Divija and posed for photographs alongside the popular Telugu actress.

articles.title: Kanwar Dhillon recalls buying his first bike with his own earnings, says ‘That gave me an incredible sense of achievement’
articles.description: Actor Kanwar Dhillon shared his journey of buying his first bike with his own earnings, a Yamaha Fazer, which he repaid with his first paycheck. He described motorcycling as a therapeutic experience and a childhood obsession. Now owning two bikes, including a Kawasaki Ninja, Dhillon emphasized the importance of safety gear and responsible riding, urging everyone to prioritize helmets and protective equipment.

articles.title: Maa Inti Bangaaram Box Office Day 3: Samantha's Film Crosses Rs 23 Crore Net In First Weekend
articles.description: Maa Inti Bangaaram earns 23.10 crore India net in opening weekend, led by strong Telugu collections, marking Samantha Ruth Prabhu's big screen return after three years.

'Jigithara' is sung by Karthik and music of the song is given by Mani Sharma. Lyrics of 'Chennai Love Story' song 'Jigithara' are written by Anantha Sriram. To know more about 'Jigithara' song from Kiran Abbavaraam and Sri Gouri Priya starrer 'Chennai Love Story' watch the video.

articles.title: More than 1000 years old, this ‘divine’ drink helps people beat the heat in Orissa, has a nutrient rarely found in vegetarian food
articles.description: Discover Tonka Torani, a traditional Odia summer drink steeped in history and offered to Lord Jagannath. This fermented rice beverage, blended with curd and spices, offers a refreshing, tangy taste and boasts significant health benefits, including improved gut health and nutrient absorption. Its deep connection to Odisha's pakhala heritage makes it a culinary and cultural cornerstone.

articles.title: Breaking Bad Star Giancarlo Esposito Embraces Islam While Shooting In Saudi Arabia, Mosque Prayer Video Goes Viral
articles.description: The actor praying at a mosque in Saudi Arabia (L).

articles.title: 'Songs Written from the Heart': India Star Virat Kohli Reveals his Go-To Track for Pre-Match Motivation
articles.description: Virat Kohli revealed his favourite pre-match song is Karan Aujla’s “Winning Speech,” which he says connects with his journey and resilience. He also spoke about his never-say-die attitude, highlighting his iconic innings vs Pakistan as an example.

articles.title: 6 Best Jokes, Moments From Samay Raina's India's Got Latent Season 2 Episode 1 Ft. Alia Bhatt, Sharvari
articles.description: From brutal celebrity roasts to contestants unexpectedly stealing the spotlight, India's Got Latent Season 2 Episode 1 delivered everything fans expected from Samay Raina's comeback. With Alia Bhatt and Sharvari joining the panel, the episode featured sharp comebacks, viral moments, and jokes that left everyone in splits.

articles.title: Inside Anshula Kapoor and Rohan Thakkar's pre-wedding festivities
articles.description: Ahead of her wedding to fiance Rohan Thakkar, Anshula Kapoor's pre-wedding celebrations have begun in full swing, bringing together members of the Kapoor family for an intimate gathering filled with love and tradition. Shanaya Kapoor, Sanjay Kapoor, mother Maheep Kapoor, Arjun Kapoor, Janhvi Kapoor and Khushi Kapoor attended the celebrations.

articles.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Day 12: Messi and Mbappe back in action as Argentina and France eye knockout stage; how to watch live streaming in US and Canada - check kick-off time and venues
articles.description: Matchday 12 of the FIFA World Cup 2026 sees Groups I and J battles intensify for Round of 32 spots. Reigning champions Argentina face Austria in a crucial Group J clash, with both teams aiming for early qualification. Meanwhile, France, led by Mbappe, eyes progression in Group I against Iraq, while Norway takes on Senegal in another pivotal encounter.

articles.title: Main Vaapas Aaunga Box Office Collection Day 10: Imtiaz Ali Film Records Highest Earnings On Second Sunday
articles.description: Main Vaapas Aaunga Box Office Collection Day 10: Imtiaz Ali's directorial Main Vaapas Aaunga, starring Naseeruddin Shah, Diljit Dosanjh, Sharvari, and Vedang Raina, collected Rs 5.75 crore on Sunday. This marked its highest single-day earnings so far.

articles.title: Quote of the day by American psychologist Stanley Milgram: "There is a propensity for people to accept definitions of action provided by legitimate authority."
articles.description: Science News: Most of us like to think we would never harm an innocent person just because someone told us to. We trust our own conscience to stop us. Stanley Milgr.

articles.description: Candace Owens shared private Charlie Kirk texts, saying they disprove Laura Loomer’s friendship claims and reveal deep distrust.

articles.description: Nagpur: A moneylender demanding a man's tongue as repayment for an unpaid debt may sound like an unlikely premise for a contemporary theatre productio.

articles.description: President Trump's Truth Social post calling an unidentified blonde woman his "great daughter" left the internet confused.

articles.title: Seema recalls Om Puri's affair during pregnancy, losing her baby
articles.description: Late actor Om Puri’s first wife, writer-director and author Seema Kapoor, has opened up about the most painful chapter of her life, revealing how their marriage fell apart after another woman entered the actor’s life, how she lost her unborn child during the turmoil, and why she refused to engage in a legal battle despite encouragement from her brother, actor Annu Kapoor.

articles.title: Jang So Jin announces that she is getting married
articles.description: In a heartwarming announcement, Jang So Jin, the former Gugudan star, revealed her upcoming wedding this August. She expressed her happiness in finding her true self with her fiancé, who has enriched her life tremendously. As they embark on this beautiful journey together, she vowed to stand by him, while fans showered them with warm wishes and congratulations across various platforms.

articles.title: Karisma Kapoor on 35 years of debut film Prem Qaidi: ‘I was straight out of school’
articles.description: Karisma Kapoor shares memories of her debut film Prem Qaidi, which released on this day 35 years ago in 1991. She was just 16 when she shot for that movie.

articles.title: Sarah Sherman talks about her love for Paul McCartney
articles.description: In a whimsical moment, Sarah Sherman of Saturday Night Live recounted her encounter with musical legend Paul McCartney. The comedian, sporting her signature mullet, was taken aback when McCartney playfully tugged it, questioning its authenticity. Her admiration for his work, especially the album 'McCartney II,' led to a lighthearted suggestion from him to 'adulate' him—an unforgettable experience for the beloved SNL star.

articles.title: Love And War Set Tragedy: Sanjay Leela Bhansali Offers Rs 40 Lakh Compensation After Worker's Death
articles.description: A tragic accident recently took place on the set of Sanjay Leela Bhansali's Love & War, which stars Alia Bhatt, Ranbir Kapoor and Vicky Kaushal in key roles. A worker reportedly died after suffering an electric shock while working on the set.

articles.title: AMMA's First Female President Shwetha Menon, Entire Committee Quits Film Body Over Internal Differences
articles.description: Menon said she had resigned not only as president but also from the primary membership of AMMA and was no longer associated with the organisation

articles.description: In a culture that rewards emotional openness, Ranbir Kapoor represents something rarer: the ability to feel deeply without needing to perform it.

articles.description: The ideal pre-yoga meal isn't the same for everyone.

articles.title: Netflix Password Sharing Isn't Dead Yet. 5 Tricks That Still Work (for Now)
articles.description: The era of shared streaming passwords is over, but that doesn't mean there aren't still a few tricks to try before forking over cash to Netflix (or Disney+ and HBO Max).

articles.title: He rejected 'dollar paycheck' in Singapore to live in Bengaluru: Techie walks away from dream job. Is it the right choice?
articles.description: An Indian tech professional, Aman Vaishnav, has gone viral after revealing why he left a high-paying machine learning job in Singapore and returned to India to start over in Bengaluru. In an Instagram video, the 26-year-old said personal circumstances prompted the move and that he chose “the life that feels right” over one that simply looked successful. While admitting he is still unsure whether it was the right decision, Vaishnav said he has never made choices out of fear.

articles.title: Star Singer: Vaisakhan grabs his 10th Golden Star with 'Devasabhathalam'
articles.description: The journey to the grand finale of Star Singer has kicked off with contestant Vaishakan captivating the audience with his breathtaking performance of a classic Malayalam semi-classical piece. His impeccable delivery not only earned him a standing ovation but also secured him his tenth Golden Star.
